# Peroot - Hebrew AI Prompt Engineering Tool

> Peroot is an AI-powered prompt generator built specifically for Hebrew. It transforms raw ideas into structured, professional-grade prompts optimized for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and other LLMs. It also generates platform-specific prompts for image and video generation tools.

## Key URLs
- [Homepage](https://www.peroot.space/): Main app - prompt enhancement tool
- [Pricing](https://www.peroot.space/pricing): Free, Guest, and Pro plan details
- [Blog](https://www.peroot.space/blog): Guides and tutorials on prompt engineering
- [Examples](https://www.peroot.space/examples): Sample prompts and use cases
- [Prompt Writing Guide](https://www.peroot.space/guide): Professional Hebrew prompt engineering guide
- [Prompt Library Index](https://www.peroot.space/prompts): Browse 480+ prompts by category
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.peroot.space/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.peroot.space/terms)
- [Contact](https://www.peroot.space/contact)
- [Full LLM Documentation](https://www.peroot.space/llms-full.txt)

## 5 Capability Modes
1. **Standard text** - Structured prompt generation for LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek)
2. **Deep research** - In-depth research prompts with multi-source methodology
3. **Image generation** - Platform-specific visual prompts
4. **Video generation** - Platform-specific video creation prompts
5. **Agent builder** - System prompts and autonomous agent configurations

## Supported Platforms

### Image Generation Platforms
Midjourney, DALL-E 3, Flux, Stable Diffusion, Google Imagen, Gemini Image

### Video Generation Platforms
Runway Gen-4, Kling 2.0, Sora, Google Veo 3, Higgsfield, Minimax Hailuo

## Product Features
- Hebrew-first prompt improver (RTL-native, not translated)
- "Great Prompt" structured output with context, goal, constraints, and format
- Platform-specific direct links after generation (open result directly in target platform)
- Clarifying questions (0-3) to refine intent
- Iterative refinement with scoring (prompt strength rated across multiple dimensions)
- 480+ prompt templates in public library
- Personal prompt library with favorites and organization
- Smart variables with {placeholder} syntax
- Refine and Quick Actions for iterative improvement
- Prompt style editor with customizable tone, length, and format
- Prompt chains/workflows with drag-and-drop builder
- Prompt version history with auto-save and restore
- Multi-language voice input (Hebrew, English, Arabic, Russian)
- Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+K, Cmd+L, Cmd+B)
- Chrome extension v2 with inline enhancement
- Guest access: 1 free prompt/day without signup
- Referral program with automatic reward system
- Multiple AI engines: GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq

## API Access
- REST API endpoint: POST /api/enhance
- Available for developers to integrate prompt enhancement into their own tools

## Pricing
- Guest: 1 free prompt/day without signup or registration
- Free: 2 credits/day, public library access, Chrome extension
- Pro: 150 credits/month, all engines, iterative refinement, personal library, 4-day free trial, NIS 3.99/month

## Key Facts
- Website: https://www.peroot.space
- Company: JoyaTech
- Creator: Gal Sasson
- Language: Hebrew (primary), with English support
- Target audience: Hebrew-speaking professionals, marketers, educators, developers, freelancers
- Built with: Next.js, React, Supabase, TypeScript, Vercel
